许墨，偶得医仙传承，开启修仙人生。我若要你三更死，阎王也难留你到五更，报仇不隔夜，杀人不手软！
“你是世家望族，豪门巨富，我一脚踏之，看谁敢与我为敌！”
“你是名门大派，秘境洞天，我一剑灭之，谁人不服皆受死！”
“你是医学泰斗，我回魂九针，一针灭你威风，一针定你生死，你还有何遗言？”
“煌煌漫天神佛，妄想主宰我命，看我踏碎凌霄，杀神灭佛，逆天改命！”
本是一世孤儿，飘零半生，最终却发现自己身份显赫，远超那世家望族，名门大派，竟是那……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d1abcab3a230917e33d2557c53d6d35","author":"唐箫","author_id":"","book_id":"7080369164795251747","book_name":"妙手神医，祸害绝色女总裁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5577人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7080369494266216993","read_count":"5577","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1531967"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"736","tags":"都市修真,都市,打脸,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6e48982fbc554f5b556de3b7e638293a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443039&x-signature=sqr41wdyGvN%2BKIlivb7tbYkuUtk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52390134357","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.4297869e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174359E081F65EA54CC5DD1DA9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24297,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":23576},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1656550446,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data
